name: shirabi
description: Connect Codex to a scoped Shirabi instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped Shirabi tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to Shirabi through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so Shirabi Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Shirabi only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
